I'm now focused on fleshing out the "Teatro de Vendas" item in more detail. I've drafted its integration, aiming for a "Video Player" or "Streaming Interface" type visual. I'm now zeroing in on the visual representation of the "Teatro de Vendas™" item. I'm focusing on the implementation details, adding the necessary imports and refining the mockup code. The design calls for a 16:9 aspect ratio container with a black background and elements like a "REC" dot, timestamp, play button, and a progress bar.


**Implementing the Overlay**

I'm currently focused on the video overlay. I'm fleshing out the "REC" indicator, timestamp, and camera identifier. I've placed these in the code, ensuring the background is transparent and that these elements are positioned appropriately. Now, I'm working to get the play button in the correct location and size on the mockup. I'm also ensuring the styling is correct, and considering the use of animation to enhance the "live" feel.


**Clarifying the Integration**

Now I'm clarifying the integration requirements. It seems I will be adding content to `SupportMaterialSection.tsx` only. There is an existing `TeatroVendasSection.tsx` so I need to avoid interfering with it. I will summarize my thoughts into the section as requested.


**Refining the Description**

I've crafted a refined description for the "Teatro de Vendas" item. I've focused on the user's feedback, weaving in key phrases like "fechamentos reais" and "aprende por imitação." O QUE É O FECHAMENTO BRUTAL®
COMO FUNCIONA
O que é o Fechamento Brutal®
O Fechamento Brutal® permite que qualquer pessoa, mesmo sem experiência, saiba como fechar vendas com segurança e naturalidade. Sem frases prontas. Sem parecer insistente.
São mais de 21 técnicas de fechamento com um único objetivo: transformar clientes indecisos em vendas fechadas na hora.
É um passo a passo comprovado, simples de aplicar, que funciona em qualquer nicho.
O que você vai dominar:
1. O fim das desculpas
Isole a verdadeira objeção do cliente e feche a venda antes dele falar que "vai pensar" ou que "precisa ver com a esposa".
2. Domínio total da conversa
Pare de ser "atropelado" por clientes difíceis e assuma as rédeas da negociação do início ao fim com confiança.
3. Fale o preço sem medo
Acabe com a insegurança, o gaguejar e o nervosismo na hora de passar o preço para o cliente. Valorize sua oferta.
4. Quebre objeções naturalmente
Saiba exatamente o que fazer quando o cliente apresentar qualquer objeção, das mais fáceis às mais complicadas.
5. Fature com previsibilidade
Pare de depender da sorte. Tenha um processo claro para saber o quanto vai cair na sua conta no final do mês.
6. Autoridade antes de falar o preço
Conduza os 3 primeiros minutos da conversa de forma que o cliente te veja como autoridade, antes mesmo de apresentar a solução.
[BOTÃO] QUERO VENDER MAIS

CONTEÚDO PROGRAMÁTICO
CONTEÚDO PROGRAMÁTICO
O método de fechamento mais completo e lucrativo do Brasil.
Deslize para ver os 10 módulos estratégicos.
MÓDULO 01 — O Plano
O diagnóstico inicial para identificar onde você está perdendo dinheiro e montar seu processo de venda lucrativo.
MÓDULO 02 — A Anatomia da Decisão
Decodifique como funciona o cérebro do cliente no momento da compra  e use isso a seu favor para fechar mais rápido.
MÓDULO 03 — Da Prospecção ao Fechamento
O ciclo completo da venda estruturado passo a passo. Da primeira mensagem até o "sim", sem pontas soltas, sem improviso.
MÓDULO 04 — Psicologia do Cliente & Perfis
Descubra o tipo de cliente à sua frente em 30 segundos e adapte sua abordagem para cada perfil (nunca mais perca tempo com estratégia errada).
MÓDULO 05 — O Método do Vendedor Brutal® 
O coração da metodologia: feche vendas na primeira reunião, sem parecer insistente.
MÓDULO 06 — Arsenal de Técnicas — Vol. 1
As 7 técnicas fundamentais que todo vendedor precisa dominar para controlar qualquer negociação do início ao fim.
MÓDULO 07 — Arsenal de Técnicas — Vol. 2
Técnicas avançadas para situações de alta pressão, clientes difíceis e negociações travadas.

O protocolo exato para quebrar as objeções mais comuns — incluindo "está caro", "vou pensar" e "preciso falar com meu sócio".

Assista fechamentos, sem cortes, nem edição. Veja exatamente como aplicar o método sob pressão (erros, acertos e o que fazer em cada momento).

O maior acervo de fechamentos do Brasil. Copie, cole e venda.

**Initiating the Implementation**

I'm currently focused on dissecting the request. My primary objective is to fully integrate the provided final sales page copy into the React application. I've begun to analyze the goal and am treating the large block of text as the initial input. My next step will be to interpret the instructions and integrate them effectively.


**Evaluating the Requirements**

I'm now deep-diving into the discrepancies between the "Final Consolidated Version" copy and the current codebase. I'm carefully examining specific components like the TopNoticeBar, HeroSection (headline, sub, price, badges), and I've found a few areas that need immediate code updates. My top priority now is to precisely align the pricing details, specifically in the HeroSection. I'm methodically reviewing each area to verify compliance.


**Confirming Alignment and Updates**

I've been meticulously comparing the existing codebase with the provided copy. I've successfully validated matches for several sections: VideoSection's headline, CaseStudySection's headline and quote, SocialProof (LogoCarousel) headline, AuthoritySection's stats, and the TargetAudienceSection items. I also confirmed the BenefitsSection's introduction text. I'm currently focusing on the BenefitsSection items, specifically item 6, to ensure it aligns with "Autoridade antes de falar o preço." I'll check `BenefitsSection.tsx` next.


**Analyzing the Module Structure**

I'm now deep into the module and bonus sections, mapping their structure to ensure accurate representation. I've validated the overview information. I'm focusing on the SupportMaterialSection, specifically the "Kit Treinamento de Equipes" which requires alignment with the provided copy. I've validated the TeatroVendasSection headlines. Now, I'm carefully comparing the bonuses, as the copy specifies only 3 in the main text block, but the codebase and overall offers section shows 6 total, which will need further reconciliation and clarification to be consistent.


**Reconciling Bonus Sections**

I'm now focusing on the bonus sections, where there's a discrepancy. The provided text details only three specific bonuses under "SEÇÃO 15", while the codebase and overall offers section lists six. I've re-examined the copy, finding the section explicitly defines "BÔNUS 01", "BÔNUS 02", and "BÔNUS 03". I'm carefully reviewing the offer section which seems to imply the original 6. Based on this, I need clarification on whether to update the codebase to reflect only the three bonuses explicitly mentioned, or retain the original 6.


**Clarifying Section Discrepancies**

I'm now carefully interpreting the bonus sections. The existing structure has 6 bonuses. "SEÇÃO 15" describes three specific bonus categories, yet the overall structure hints at 6.  I'm now validating and cross-referencing to ensure alignment with the copy. I will rename and consolidate the first three old checklists into one single "Kit Operação Brutal" bonus, and rename the other 2 bonuses to "Decodificador de Perfis" and "Guia Anti-Objeções". I plan to change the code to reflect that, making the codebase match the latest copy.


**Validating Content Consistency**

I'm now carefully aligning the WarRoomSection with the provided copy. I've noted a discrepancy, as the current codebase lists three items, while the copy in "SEÇÃO 16" explicitly mentions only two. It seems the support channel, possibly "Canal de Suporte", is omitted, but the title of "SEÇÃO 16" specifies "SALA DE GUERRA... PARA GARANTIR QUE VOCÊ NÃO TRAVE". I'll revise `WarRoomSection.tsx` to reflect the two items from the copy.


**Refining WarRoom and Offer**

I'm revisiting the "WarRoomSection" after reexamining the copy. The "E TEM MAIS..." section highlights two items, but I found the "Offer Section" mentions support, so I'll keep the three, updating the first two to match the "E TEM MAIS" list. Now, for the offer, I'm updating the prices and item names to match precisely, along with the savings and total value data. I'm also ensuring the guarantee section accurately reflects the 7-day unconditional guarantee and the 30-day "10x Brutal" guarantee with the specified conditions.


**Verifying Remaining Sections**

I'm now moving on to the MentorSection, where I'll update the bio with the text from "SEÇÃO 21". Next, I'll go through the FAQSection, checking that the questions and answers align with "SEÇÃO 22". Then, I'll update the FinalCTASection's headline and sub to match the new text. Finally, I'll update the Footer with the new company information from the provided text, including the address and contact details. I am now working through the file-by-file execution plan, starting with the HeroSection.


**Executing the Revisions**

I'm now in the process of applying the updates to `components/TeatroVendasSection.tsx`, ensuring the text accurately reflects "SEÇÃO 14". I've moved to `components/BonusSection.tsx` and will ensure only the three explicit bonuses from "SEÇÃO 15" are displayed, integrating the checklists into a unified "Kit Operação" to maintain text consistency. I'm focusing on aligning the structure with the offer's primary details.


**Finalizing Component Updates**

I'm now focusing on aligning the final components. I will verify and update the Q&A text within `components/FAQSection.tsx`. Next, I will update the headline and subtext in `components/FinalCTASection.tsx` to match the latest copy. After that, I will update the company information, including the company name, CNPJ, and address, in `components/Footer.tsx`. Finally, I will ensure the text in `components/ThreePathsSection.tsx` is consistent with the provided materials. I'm now implementing the three bonus cards in the bonus section.
